version_description: Easy version to play with a capo on the 6th fret. If you want to obmit the Em9 chord, take use of the SIMPLIFY function in the bottom menu.

versions.version_description: Version without capo, so that you can play along with the song.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:

[ch]Em[/ch]
